title: Add Danish Prakash as a reviewer
body:
His contributions to date more than justify the role.

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

comments.body:
@danishprakash Mind confirming you're interested in the role?

@containers/podman-maintainers PTAL

LGTM
A no-brainer, thanks for all the contributions @danishprakash !
As per governance we only need two maintainers approvals so I merge this and we do not have to wait for everyone
